summary: Vehicle Inspection Damages Feature - Backend 100% PASS, Frontend UI renders but zone interaction needs investigation. Backend PUT /api/admin/contracts/{id}/update-fields correctly accepts damages dict and saves to contract_data.damages. PDF generation includes damage table when damages exist. Frontend /contract/{id} shows 'ÉTAT DU VÉHICULE' section with inspection diagram, but zone clicks aren't triggering the damage modal in Playwright automation. The image aspectRatio:1 style isn't applying correctly (renders as 1858x350 instead of square).

ui_bugs.issue: Zone click events not triggering in Playwright - TouchableOpacity onPress may not respond to synthetic mouse events in React Native Web
aspectRatio: 1 style not applying correctly - image container renders as 1858x350 instead of square

issues: Zone overlay boundaries may not align with image due to non-square container

action_items: Investigate why aspectRatio: 1 on imageContainer isn't rendering correctly in React Native Web
Test zone click interaction manually in browser to verify functionality
Consider adding testID prop transformation for React Native Web compatibility (data-testid may not render as HTML attribute)
critical_code_review_comments: VehicleInspection component code structure is correct with data-testid attributes on zones, modal inputs, and buttons
Backend damages field handling is robust - accepts dict, validates against EDITABLE whitelist, properly saves to contract_data.damages
PDF generation correctly handles damages dict - includes ZONE_LABELS mapping and damage table when damages exist
Zone positions are defined as percentages (e.g., top: '2%', left: '33%') which depend on square container for correct alignment

success_rate.backend: 100% - All 8 tests passed (damages CRUD, PDF generation)
success_rate.frontend: PARTIAL - UI renders correctly but zone interaction couldn't be verified via automation

context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend damages feature fully working - verified via pytest. Frontend VehicleInspection component renders inspection diagram in 'ÉTAT DU VÉHICULE' section on /contract/[id]. Zone interactions need manual testing - Playwright mouse clicks aren't triggering TouchableOpacity onPress events. Contract ID 0728a2a2-5372-4dac-812a-e5c668f2548e used for testing. Login works via 'Se connecter' button text selector.

frontend_zone_clicks.details: Could not verify zone clicks via Playwright - needs manual testing

frontend_damage_modal.details: Modal existence confirmed in code but couldn't trigger via automation

frontend_contract_save.details: Contract save flow verified in previous iteration - edit mode toggle works
